message:
feat: progressive rate-limit thresholds + Retry-After escalation (Phase 2 of #8676) (#8772)

Add tiered Retry-After escalation based on consecutive auth failure count:
- Normal (< 6 failures): 60s Retry-After
- Escalate (6-10): 300s (5min)
- Soft-lock (11-20): 900s (15min) + slog.Warn
- Hard-lock (21+): 3600s (1hr)

Auth failures are recorded in oauthErrorRedirect so every OAuth error
path feeds the failure tracker. The authLimiter's LimitReached handler
reads the tracker to set progressive Retry-After headers.

Fixes #8676

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
